title: Video shows ships turning away from the Strait of Hormuz as confusion persists over whether sea lane is really open
summary_full: The Strait of Hormuz remained effectively closed despite Iran's declaration Friday that it is open, maritime freight and oil analysts told CNBC.
summary_public: The Strait of Hormuz remained effectively closed despite Iran's declaration Friday that it is open, maritime freight and oil analysts told CNBC.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Strait of Hormuz remained effectively closed despite Iran's declaration
